title: oxytropis montana subsp. samnitica
intro: Oxytropis montana subsp. samnitica, also known as the Samnite Mountain Milkvetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae, native to the Italian Peninsula. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Oxytropis montana subsp. samnitica include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
